source_pr.title: domain,session: fix annoying log when running session bench test
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve?

```
cd session
go test -check.f XXX -test.bench Benchmark
```

What I want:

```
BenchmarkBasic-16                              	   38066	     28349 ns/op
BenchmarkTableScan-16                          	    6150	    205441 ns/op
BenchmarkExplainTableScan-16                   	   19684	     54121 ns/op
BenchmarkTableLookup-16                        	   16795	     74477 ns/op
BenchmarkExplainTableLookup-16                 	   43236	     31524 ns/op
BenchmarkStringIndexScan-16                    	    4254	    280159 ns/op
BenchmarkExplainStringIndexScan-16             	   14622	     81911 ns/op
BenchmarkStringIndexLookup-16                  	    6004	    195449 ns/op
BenchmarkIntegerIndexScan-16                   	    4393	    278203 ns/op
BenchmarkIntegerIndexLookup-16                 	    6073	    205663 ns/op
BenchmarkDecimalIndexScan-16                   	    3489	    328341 ns/op
BenchmarkDecimalIndexLookup-16                 	    5578	    209139 ns/op
BenchmarkInsertWithIndex-16                    	    4204	    263469 ns/op
BenchmarkInsertNoIndex-16                      	    4508	    254953 ns/op
BenchmarkSort-16                               	     218	   5502274 ns/op
BenchmarkJoin-16                               	    1786	    633263 ns/op
BenchmarkJoinLimit-16                          	    1785	    679006 ns/op
BenchmarkPartitionPruning-16                   	     778	   1482036 ns/op
BenchmarkRangeColumnPartitionPruning-16        	f    1597	    752830 ns/op
BenchmarkHashPartitionPruningPointSelect-16    	    2348	    466922 ns/op
BenchmarkHashPartitionPruningMultiSelect-16    	     781	   1582944 ns/op
PASS
ok  	github.com/pingcap/tidb/session	85.420s
```
What I get:


So many annoying log... I can't read the result!

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

I try to run some regression test https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/25754, but I find some of the code is broken.

What's Changed:

Avoid unnecessary log.

How it Works:

1. Close `domain` before `store`, because if we close store first, the domain is still using the store, thus there will be error output.
2. Move `sysSessionPool.Close()` after statistic handle close, because the later is still using the session pool on exit
3. Disable the slow query log in bench test to avoid the slow log output


### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->
